response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of strong, domain-relevant technical experience — developer tooling, test infrastructure (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD setup, and MCP/agentic tooling — that aligns well with the technical focus areas of this role. However, the position is fundamentally a people leadership role requiring at least 2 years of people management, and the resume contains zero evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, hiring, or leading an engineering team. Staff-level IC titles and community teaching (workshops, dojos) indicate technical seniority but do not substitute for people management. Without that experience, he does not meet the minimum qualifications.
strengths: Deep, direct experience in developer tooling and testing infrastructure — including building a test runner (Trial), a TDD assertion library (Fluent-Asserts), Selenium courses, and MCP code generators
Broad technical breadth across mobile (iOS/Apple TV), embedded, web, and distributed systems, satisfying the mobile-platform knowledge preferred qualification
Demonstrated culture of knowledge sharing through workshops, conference talks, and organizing recurring code kata/refactoring sessions — valuable for a team-development mandate
concerns: No evidence of people management: no direct reports, no mention of performance reviews, 1:1s, hiring, or team headcount ownership across any role
No indication of organizational change leadership or cross-team roadmap ownership at the level expected of a Level II Engineering Manager
All roles are individual contributor titles (Senior/Staff SWE, Founder/sole developer); the Founder role at GISCollective appears to be a solo open-source project rather than a managed team

key_factors.factor: Domain fit: developer tools and test infrastructure
